g.title: cluster_val
g.text: VALIDATION — 8 checks, run once at ingest

g.title: cluster_heur
g.text: HEURISTIC REGISTRY — a fixed list, iterated in order

g.title: cluster_cross
g.text: CROSS-SUBMISSION — needs more than one bundle

g.title: index
g.text: ordered access, per-session and per-file views

g.title: recon
g.text: replay edits; tag each line typed / pasted /

g.title: cand
g.text: one place to teach about a new paste source

g.title: integ
g.text: lifts each FAILED check into the same flag list

g.title: imove
g.text: is this paste a copy of the student's OWN
earlier content, whose provenance is typed?

g.title: sort
g.text: then supporting seq ↑ — a stable tie-break that

g.title: down
g.text: scores 0 under default weights, so it leaves the
ranked queue — but is NEVER suppressed. The record
and its jump-to-source link both remain.

g.title: imove->keep
g.text: no — or the source region itself

g.title: c1
g.text: sha256 exact → high · fuzzy line match → medium

g.title: c2
g.text: anomalously similar timing and file-switch order
